title: Gomen Be Sega (Ethiopian Collard Greens Stew)
description: A traditional Ethiopian stew made with collard greens and spices.

ingredients.name: Gomen (Ethiopian collard greens spice mix)
ingredients.notes: available in most Ethiopian markets or online

instructions: Heat oil in a large pan over medium heat.
Add onions and cook until softened (4-5 minutes).
Add garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add chopped collard greens, Gomen spice mix, salt, and black pepper.
Mix well and cook for 5 minutes.
Add 2 cups of water and bring to a boil.
Reduce heat and simmer for 20-25 minutes or until greens are tender.
